PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-24-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FRONTIER AIRLINES
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-14-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-13-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SULAYMAAN HJINAT CHERIF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRONTIER AIRLINES IS NOT PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE HEARING. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MAR-13-2020 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
